# Vendored Dependencies

## MiniSearch

- **Source:** https://github.com/lucaong/minisearch
- **License:** MIT
- **File:** `minisearch.js` (UMD build, ~2000 lines)
- **How to update:** Download the latest UMD build from [unpkg](https://unpkg.com/minisearch/dist/umd/index.js) or [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/minisearch) and replace `minisearch.js`.

MiniSearch is used for BM25-ranked full-text search over playlist titles.
